scope: Current Segment Redocly OpenAPI v73.0.0 exposes 187 documented operations (89 GET, 98 mutations). This bundle keeps the three legacy-parity streams unchanged and quarantines the rest as ENGINE_GAP: complete coverage requires multi-level parent-resource graph discovery/fan-out across spaces, audiences, destinations, warehouses, sources, functions, IAM, and Reverse ETL resources. The extra /workspaces entry is the legacy endpoint used by the existing stream; current docs publish workspace metadata as GET /.

excluded.reason: workspace-configuration or governance mutation requiring broader administrative scopes than the legacy read-only connector declares
